name: creative-pipeline-mcp
description: QC-first MCP pipeline for Blender assets and Premiere media workflows.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/blender-pro-mcp packages/premiere-pro-mcp packages/director-agent packages/blender-gpl-adapters packages/premiere-windows-adapter packages/dashboard
scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean packages/core packages/blender-pro-mcp packages/premiere-pro-mcp packages/director-agent packages/blender-gpl-adapters packages/premiere-windows-adapter packages/dashboard && rm -rf artifacts
